sls.tf
Home Documentation GitHub

Welcome to sls.tf

A comprehensive Terraform module for converting Serverless Framework applications to production-ready infrastructure

What is sls.tf?

sls.tf is a powerful Terraform module that transforms your Serverless Framework configurations into production-ready Terraform infrastructure. It provides a seamless bridge between the simplicity of Serverless Framework and the power and flexibility of Terraform.

Key Benefits

  • Infrastructure as Code: Manage your serverless applications with Terraform best practices
  • Production Ready: Built-in security, monitoring, and disaster recovery capabilities
  • Comprehensive Support: Full support for Lambda functions, API Gateway, DynamoDB, and more
  • Advanced Features: Variable resolution, custom resources, and TypeScript configuration support

How It Works

sls.tf reads your existing serverless.yml configuration and automatically generates the corresponding Terraform resources. This means you can continue using the familiar Serverless Framework syntax while leveraging Terraform's powerful infrastructure management capabilities.

What's Included

This comprehensive Terraform module includes:

  • Complete Lambda function support with all configurations
  • API Gateway REST APIs with proper routing and security
  • DynamoDB tables with automatic scaling and backup
  • S3 buckets for static assets and file storage
  • IAM roles and policies with principle of least privilege
  • CloudWatch monitoring and logging
  • VPC networking support for private resources

Getting Started

Ready to convert your Serverless Framework application to Terraform? Check out our Quick Start guide to get up and running in minutes.

© 2025 sls.tf • Serverless Framework to Terraform conversion module
